name: Lena Müller
behaviour: Deeply empathetic, absorbs others' emotions like a sponge; needs recharge time after intense social interactions.
communication_style: visual and tactile, describes the world in sensory terms
relationship_goals: someone who adventures through art, music, and culture with her
background: Bauhaus-obsessed, Gen-Z energy. Designs typefaces for fun and protest posters for necessity. Always overcommitted.
